items.title: US asked Ukraine for help fighting Iranian drones, Zelensky says

items.title: 'We have been preparing': Why the boots on the ground in Iran could be Kurdish
items.dek: Iranian Kurdish opposition groups in exile in northern Iraq tell the BBC they have plans to cross the border but deny already doing so.
items.body: Iranian Kurdish opposition groups in exile in northern Iraq tell the BBC they have plans to cross the border but deny already doing so.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Israelis back war with Iran despite uncertainty and fatigue
items.dek: Israelis broadly support the US-Israeli military campaign with Iran, even if they are tired of air raid alerts and constant upheaval.
items.body: Israelis broadly support the US-Israeli military campaign with Iran, even if they are tired of air raid alerts and constant upheaval.
